name: HGBMI
description: Church attendance system built with React + Express.js and Neon PostgreSQL featuring QR-code scanning, JWT role-based auth, and Resend email OTP. Deployed on Vercel + Render.

name: Edifix
description: Stage-based web development learning platform built with React, Node.js/Express, and MySQL.

name: KidneyCheck
description: Kidney disease risk screening MVP in React with a quiz, referral letter generation, and BP trend dashboard.

name: Codex
description: Collaborative full-stack product under the Codex Tech Hub org built with MongoDB/Mongoose.
